TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}
TEXT.source: told by Giɫgiɫaw of Vaɫulu village

S.FORM: izua za itua matjaita umaq izua za ngiaw a ita.
S.PHON: izua za itua macaita umaq izua za ŋiaw a ita.
S.FORM: izua za itua matjaita umaq izua za ngiaw a ita.
S.PHON: izua za itua maʦaita umaq izua za ŋiaw a ita.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time in a house there was a cat.

S.FORM: qau djuɫam aravats azua ngiaw tua zua qiqi.
S.PHON: qau ɉuʎam aravaʦ azua ŋiaw tua zua qiqi.
S.FORM: qau djuljam aravac azua ngiaw tua zua qiqi.
S.PHON: qau ɉuʎam aravaʦ azua ŋiaw tua zua qiqi.
S.TRANSL: The cat was very good at catching mice.

S.FORM: manu mazepzep azua mareka aɫak nua qiqi: "aku ika nakisumavan sa tja matjaɫaɫak tua kiqetsi?
S.PHON: manu mazəpzəp azua marəka aʎak nua qiqi: "aku ika nakisumavan sa ca macaʎaʎak tua kiqəʦi?
S.FORM: manu mazepzep azua mareka aljak nua qiqi: "aku ika nakisumavan sa tja matjaljaljak tua kiqeci?
S.PHON: manu mazəpzəp azua marəka aʎak nua qiqi: "aku ika nakisumavan sa ʦa maʦaʎaʎak tua kiqəʦi?
S.TRANSL: So the mice children discussed together: “Why don’t our parents do anything about fighting the cat?

S.FORM: ku pai ari tja sikasavidan a kakeḍian sa tja qetsii azua ngiaw a namalalap tua tja sevalitan," aya, sa kaqepuqepu a mazepzep.
S.PHON: ku pai ari ca sikasavidan a kakəɖian sa ca qəʦii azua ŋiaw a namaɭaɭap tua ca səvaɭitan," aja, sa kaqəpuqəpu a mazəpzəp.
S.FORM: ku pai ari tja sikasavidan a kakedrian sa tja qecii azua ngiaw a namalalap tua tja sevalitan," aya, sa kaqepuqepu a mazepzep.
S.PHON: ku pai ari ʦa sikasavidan a kakəɖian sa ʦa qəʦii azua ŋiaw a namaɭaɭap tua ʦa səvaɭitan," aja, sa kaqəpuqəpu a mazəpzəp.
S.TRANSL: So come on! Let us children go it alone and kill the cat that has taken our ancestors,” so they got together to discuss it.

S.FORM: ka marasudj, mapangapangaɫ tiamadju tua uri tjaɫuqulu a kemats, tua tjaɫuuquɫ, sana vaivaik.
S.PHON: ka marasuɉ, mapaŋapaŋaʎ tiamaɉu tua uri caʎuquɭu a kəmaʦ, tua caʎuuquʎ, sana vaivaik.
S.FORM: ka marasudj, mapangapangalj tiamadju tua uri tjaljuqulu a kemac, tua tjaljuuqulj, sana vaivaik.
S.PHON: ka marasuɉ, mapaŋapaŋaʎ tiamaɉu tua uri ʦaʎuquɭu a kəmaʦ, tua ʦaʎuuquʎ, sana vaivaik.
S.TRANSL: When they had agreed, they were divided up into those who would bite the cat’s head and those who would bite its back, and off they went.

S.FORM: manu malesles tiamadju, sa senay a djemaladjalan: "makaya men aravats.
S.PHON: manu maɭəsɭəs tiamaɉu, sa sənaj a ɉəmaɭaɉaɭan: "makaja mən aravaʦ.
S.FORM: manu malesles tiamadju, sa senay a djemaladjalan: "makaya men aravac.
S.PHON: manu maɭəsɭəs tiamaɉu, sa sənaj a ɉəmaɭaɉaɭan: "makaja mən aravaʦ.
S.TRANSL: So they lined up and sang as they went: “We are very strong.

S.FORM: keɫu samaza-u a ngiaw; nia su papatsayaw," aya tiamadju a pasiqatsangata.
S.PHON: kəʎu samaza-u a ŋiaw; nia su papaʦajaw," aja tiamaɉu a pasiqaʦaŋata.
S.FORM: kelju samaza-u a ngiaw; nia su papacayaw," aya tiamadju a pasiqacangata.
S.PHON: kəʎu samaza-u a ŋiaw; nia su papaʦajaw," aja tiamaɉu a pasiqaʦaŋata.
S.TRANSL: Come here, cat. We’re going to kill you,” they said very loudly.

S.FORM: manu langdan nazua vuluvulung a qiqi.
S.PHON: manu ɭaŋdan nazua vuɭuvuɭuŋ a qiqi.
S.FORM: manu langdan nazua vuluvulung a qiqi.
S.PHON: manu ɭaŋdan nazua vuɭuvuɭuŋ a qiqi.
S.TRANSL: An old mouse heard them,

S.FORM: "semainu amen aya mun a sedjeɫ a kakeḍian?
S.PHON: "səmainu amən aja mun a səɉəʎ a kakəɖian?
S.FORM: "semainu amen aya mun a sedjelj a kakedrian?
S.PHON: "səmainu amən aja mun a səɉəʎ a kakəɖian?
S.TRANSL: and said: “Where do you think you are going, you children all on your own?

S.FORM: kemuda sa nu kakaya a qemtsi tua ngiaw?" ayain.
S.PHON: kəmuda sa nu kakaja a qəmʦi tua ŋiaw?" ajain.
S.FORM: kemuda sa nu kakaya a qemci tua ngiaw?" ayain.
S.PHON: kəmuda sa nu kakaja a qəmʦi tua ŋiaw?" ajain.
S.TRANSL: How can you kill the cat?”

S.FORM: ɫakua, "malitseng.
S.PHON: ʎakua, "maɭiʦəŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua, "maliceng.
S.PHON: ʎakua, "maɭiʦəŋ.
S.TRANSL: But they answered: “Be quiet.

S.FORM: pai patsutsunu amen.
S.PHON: pai paʦuʦunu amən.
S.FORM: pai pacucunu amen.
S.PHON: pai paʦuʦunu amən.
S.TRANSL: Just watch us.

S.FORM: tjara nia qetsin," aya temvela, sa puarut sakamaya.
S.PHON: cara nia qəʦin," aja təmvəɭa, sa puarut sakamaja.
S.FORM: tjara nia qecin," aya temvela, sa puarut sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʦara nia qəʦin," aja təmvəɭa, sa puarut sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: We’ll certainly kill it,” and they just went on.

S.FORM: ka tjaɫu qinaɫivan tiamadju, semkez anan a pakeɫang tua uri pakazuanan.
S.PHON: ka caʎu qinaʎivan tiamaɉu, səmkəz anan a pakəʎaŋ tua uri pakazuanan.
S.FORM: ka tjalju qinaljivan tiamadju, semkez anan a pakeljang tua uri pakazuanan.
S.PHON: ka ʦaʎu qinaʎivan tiamaɉu, səmkəz anan a pakəʎaŋ tua uri pakazuanan.
S.TRANSL: When they got to the roof, they paused for instructions about the route.

S.FORM: "ari," ka ayain nazua kamakama niamadju, vaik a sema teku a mapuɫat a kipagaɫu.
S.PHON: "ari," ka ajain nazua kamakama niamaɉu, vaik a səma təku a mapuʎat a kipagaʎu.
S.FORM: "ari," ka ayain nazua kamakama niamadju, vaik a sema teku a mapuljat a kipagalju.
S.PHON: "ari," ka ajain nazua kamakama niamaɉu, vaik a səma təku a mapuʎat a kipagaʎu.
S.TRANSL: When their leader said: “Let’s go,” they all went below slowly.

S.FORM: ka manu sarigsig tiamadju, patseged azua ngiaw sa pangiaw.
S.PHON: ka manu sarigsig tiamaɉu, paʦəgəd azua ŋiaw sa paŋiaw.
S.FORM: ka manu sarigsig tiamadju, paceged azua ngiaw sa pangiaw.
S.PHON: ka manu sarigsig tiamaɉu, paʦəgəd azua ŋiaw sa paŋiaw.
S.TRANSL: But when they made a scratching noise the cat woke up and miaowed.

S.FORM: ka lemangda tiamadju, "ari," nuka ayain nua kamakama, migerger anga sakamaya a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: ka ɭəmaŋda tiamaɉu, "ari," nuka ajain nua kamakama, migərgər aŋa sakamaja a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: ka lemangda tiamadju, "ari," nuka ayain nua kamakama, migerger anga sakamaya a mapuljat.
S.PHON: ka ɭəmaŋda tiamaɉu, "ari," nuka ajain nua kamakama, migərgər aŋa sakamaja a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: When they heard that, even though the leader said: “Come on,” they all just shook with fear.

S.FORM: ka migatsaɫ azua ngiaw, tjara mavilavilad anga tiamadju.
S.PHON: ka migaʦaʎ azua ŋiaw, cara maviɭaviɭad aŋa tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: ka migacalj azua ngiaw, tjara mavilavilad anga tiamadju.
S.PHON: ka migaʦaʎ azua ŋiaw, ʦara maviɭaviɭad aŋa tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: When the cat got up, they all just ran away.

S.FORM: azua zuma tjeqelas; azua zuma makelu tua qutjavan.
S.PHON: azua zuma cəqəɭas; azua zuma makəɭu tua qucavan.
S.FORM: azua zuma tjeqelas; azua zuma makelu tua qutjavan.
S.PHON: azua zuma ʦəqəɭas; azua zuma makəɭu tua quʦavan.
S.TRANSL: Some slipped and some fell in their hurry.

S.FORM: ka tjaɫu umaq anga, "pai kayaya ken," ayain anga nazua vuluvulung a qiqi, sa kapedjelian.
S.PHON: ka caʎu umaq aŋa, "pai kajaja kən," ajain aŋa nazua vuɭuvuɭuŋ a qiqi, sa kapəɉəɭian.
S.FORM: ka tjalju umaq anga, "pai kayaya ken," ayain anga nazua vuluvulung a qiqi, sa kapedjelian.
S.PHON: ka ʦaʎu umaq aŋa, "pai kajaja kən," ajain aŋa nazua vuɭuvuɭuŋ a qiqi, sa kapəɉəɭian.
S.TRANSL: When they got back home, the old mouse said: “I told you so,” and laughed at them.

S.FORM: azua mareka kakeḍian a qiqi: "ku maya tja parutan a maya," ayanga tiamadju a kisan ngeli a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: azua marəka kakəɖian a qiqi: "ku maja ca parutan a maja," ajaŋa tiamaɉu a kisan ŋəɭi a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: azua mareka kakedrian a qiqi: "ku maya tja parutan a maya," ayanga tiamadju a kisan ngeli a mapuljat.
S.PHON: azua marəka kakəɖian a qiqi: "ku maja ʦa parutan a maja," ajaŋa tiamaɉu a kisan ŋəɭi a mapuʎat.
S.TRANSL: And the mice children all said: “How weak we are after all,” laughing at themselves.
